name: Visual Studio
description: Microsoft Visual Studio is a full-featured integrated development environment for Windows targeting .NET, C++, and cross-platform mobile and web development.

years.notes: Möbius infinity loop with blue-to-purple gradient — the Aero-era rebrand that introduced the curved infinity. Extracted from the wordmark; only the outermost infinity path is retained for 24×24 legibility.
Modern Style angular VS cube — flat purple replacing the curved 2010 Möbius. Extracted from the wordmark, scaled from 36×36.
Refined VS cube in lighter purple (#865FC5) — retains the angular silhouette but a softer Fluent-leaning shade.

Current chevron-infinity refresh — three gradient-filled ribbons forming a stylized Möbius, returning to the curve language of the 2010 era. Drop-shadow filters from the source are omitted for 24×24 rendering.

notes: Visual Studio 2005 was not added — no authoritative SVG of the standalone icon could be located on Wikimedia Commons or Microsoft brand assets (search returned only PNG/EPS sources of insufficient provenance). The 1995-2003 'tape spool' marks were also skipped for the same reason.
